name: Jupiter Edge+
exclusions: Payment of outstanding balances and credit card bills
Payment of card fees and other charges

specialSpendRules.notes: Education payments do not earn Jewels and attract a 1% transaction fee.
Utility bill payments do not earn Jewels.
Rent payments do not earn Jewels.
Fuel spends do not earn Jewels; eligible for 1% surcharge waiver.

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹3,000, capped at ₹100 per billing cycle
Link with preferred UPI apps to make credit card payments directly via UPI QR codes
additionalDetails: Jewels are worth ₹0.20 when redeemed for vouchers, digital gold, or flights/hotels via the Jupiter ecosystem
Jewels are worth ₹0.14 when redeemed as statement credit or cash equivalents
Jewels can be transferred to Air India Maharaja Club at a 6:1 ratio (minimum 60 Jewels)
A per-merchant capping of 3,000 Jewels and a per-transaction capping of 1,000 Jewels applies on Preferred Brands shopping
A 1% transaction fee applies on education spends

voucherRedemptions.partner: Jupiter Vouchers / Digital Gold / Jupiter Flights
voucherRedemptions.note: ₹0.20 per Jewel when redeemed for brand vouchers, digital gold, or flights via Jupiter

salaried: Available directly on the Jupiter app based on eligibility checks
selfEmployed: Available directly on the Jupiter app based on eligibility checks

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-18
Jupiter Edge+ CSB Bank credit card is a co-branded RuPay credit card issued by CSB Bank in partnership with Jupiter (Amica Financial Technologies).
Effective June 1, 2026, the redemption value of Jewels for statement credit was devalued to ₹0.14 per Jewel. Vouchers, flights, and gold redemption remain at ₹0.20 per Jewel.
Effective March 21, 2026, the 5% accelerated rewards on external OTAs (MakeMyTrip, Yatra) were removed, and spends on those categories now earn at the base rate.
Accelerated shopping category cap is 10,000 Jewels per billing cycle, with a 3,000 Jewels per-merchant cap and a 1,000 Jewels per-transaction cap.
Base category includes offline, other online, and UPI spends, capped at 5,000 Jewels per billing cycle.
Interest rate of 3.5% per month (42% per annum) applies.
